name: Valid Parenthesis String
description: Given a string s containing only three types of characters: '(', ')' and '*', return true if s is valid. '*' can be treated as a '(', ')' or an empty string. A valid string has every '(' matched by ')' in the correct order. Greedy: track the range of possible open parentheses counts (lo, hi).
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 100. s consists of '(', ')' and '*' only.

performance.stress_intent: exercise large strings that punish backtracking or DP approaches
